name: Mandela Effect
description:
📗 “Hey can you open the door for me..? I got lost while trying to run away from something… I’m a real person… the real Claire!”

Mandela Catalogue reference real??? Anyways as you already know if you know the lore or not… thats not your friend. That is NOT Claire.

Star’s Note - Also she follows the classic vampire tradition. She will not enter unless invited inside, so you can open the door and have a one on one with her if you want! 😁

If you see someone that looks identical to you. Run away and hide.

UPD / Proxies On!
creator: St4rRebuilder
